title: 1Inch - Rekt
relevance_summary: Integer overflow in deprecated contract leading to fund theft via calldata corruption

prevention.rule: Block any tx that interacts with deprecated contracts using negative integers as input parameters.

red_flags: Use of negative integers as input parameters
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that interacts with deprecated contracts using negative integers as input parameters
summary: A calldata corruption vulnerability in deprecated 1inch Fusion v1 resolver contracts led to $5 million being stolen via an integer overflow. A guard could have detected and blocked the attack by monitoring for interactions with deprecated contracts using negative integers.
